quicksight.dashboard.fieldseriesitem.Cfn: The field series item configuration of a line chart.

quicksight.dashboard.fieldseriesitem.Axi.Description: The axis that you are binding the field to.

quicksight.dashboard.fieldseriesitem.Fie.Description: The field ID of the field for which you are setting the axis binding.

quicksight.dashboard.fieldseriesitem.Set.Description: The options that determine the presentation of line series associated to the field.
